endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.GuestConfiguration/operations
endpoints.description: Lists all of the available GuestConfiguration REST API operations.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines/{vmName}/providers/Microsoft.GuestConfiguration/guestConfigurationAssignments
endpoints.description: List all guest configuration assignments for a virtual machine.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{VMNAME}} with a real vmname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.
